description: PQC-specific overlay codes that supplement NAICS 2022 sector codes and ISO 3166 country codes in Trust Engine applicability filtering

codes.label: Government Cryptographic Infrastructure
codes.description: Applies to government agencies and their contractors that manage classified or sensitive-but-unclassified cryptographic infrastructure subject to national PQC transition mandates (e.g., NSM-10, CNSA 2.0, BSI TR-02102).

codes.label: Critical Infrastructure Operator
codes.description: Applies to operators of critical infrastructure sectors (energy, water, transportation, communications, financial) that are subject to sector-specific PQC migration guidance from CISA, ENISA, or equivalent bodies.

codes.label: IoT and Embedded Systems Manufacturer
codes.description: Applies to manufacturers of IoT devices, embedded systems, and connected hardware where constrained compute environments limit PQC algorithm choices and long device lifetimes create harvest-now-decrypt-later exposure.

codes.label: Financial Settlement and Clearing
codes.description: Applies to financial market infrastructure (exchanges, CCPs, CSDs, payment systems) where long-term data integrity requirements and regulatory oversight create heightened PQC migration urgency.
